description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and landscaped greenery. The main building features a symmetrical facade with multiple windows, a central entryway, and a gable roof. The garage is positioned to the left of the house, connected by a wide driveway that accommodates a parked car. The backyard includes a small pool and additional green space, while mature trees and shrubs are distributed around the property. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the roof is dark gray, providing a classic, clean appearance. The house is surrounded by a mix of paved and grassy areas, typical of residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, paved driveway, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a small pool. The house has a symmetrical facade, light exterior walls, and a dark gable roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, detached garage, and a car parked in front, with trees and shrubs flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and a large tree partially obscuring the house, with the side wall and windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, small pool, and rear facade of the house with large windows and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the garage from behind, the side of the house, and additional landscaping with trees and grass.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small steps, and flanking windows, framed by a paved walkway and minimal decorative elements.
